meaning: n.王牌,法宝,最后大的手段,喇叭vt.打出王牌赢,胜过vi.出王牌,吹喇叭n.<口>好人
examples: The administration knows that's their trump card and will keep playing it as long as they can.
The trump card is the Andes mountain range.
The propagandists' trump card "wreck our brilliant health care system".
In South Florida, where 3, 000 Trump condos are under construction, the threat of an oversupply looms.
The philanthropy card is used only to trump the competition, not as a chief selling point.
